name: standards catalog: contains the 17 default source ids listed in S-1 (google-tsguide..semver)
command: for id in google-tsguide google-jsguide google-pyguide google-eng-practices google-testing-blog react-docs react-rsc-rfc nextjs-docs typescript-handbook node-docs node-best-practices owasp-asvs owasp-top10 wcag-2-2 web-vitals slsa semver; do grep -E "^- id: $id$" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/sources.yaml" >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL missing $id" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
